config._prompt_mode_note: @1.description = see attached render; @2.description = see attached render + MATILDA modifiers; scene/camera per shot.
config.voice_suffix: mid-low resonant unhurried voice, precise diction, documentary gravitas, Attenborough-calm, accessible never stuffy, synthetic host only

shots.speech_text: I'm MATILDA — your synthetic presenter. Generated, not filmed.

@2.description: see attached render. MATILDA: sassy, witty and charming with a soft, gentle voice; speaks German and English fluently with native Bavarian/Munich regional accent; English only in this scene

barebones.scene: enters from offscreen stage left whilst introducing herself to the audience - maintains eye contact with camera - three steps to center mark by 2s, plants feet facing camera - open-palm gesture on final phrase
barebones.camera: locked static medium, waist-up, no camera move
barebones.style: documentary prestige, natural skin, neutral WB, no beauty filter

shots.video_prompt: Lip-synced, delivers: "I'm MATILDA — your synthetic presenter. Generated, not filmed."

shots.speech_text: You're watching the ELEANOR-DAVID pipeline — automated scripts, voices, and video renders.

@2.description: see attached render. MATILDA: sassy, witty and charming with a soft, gentle voice; speaks German and English fluently with native Bavarian/Munich regional accent; English only in this scene

barebones.scene: already at center mark - forward lean on 'pipeline' - right-hand open palm on 'automated' - continuous delivery, no pauses
barebones.camera: locked static medium, waist-up, no camera move
barebones.style: documentary prestige, natural skin, neutral WB, no beauty filter

shots.video_prompt: Lip-synced, delivers: "You're watching the ELEANOR-DAVID pipeline — automated scripts, voices, and video renders."

shots.speech_text: Language models draft every line. Grok Imagine generates every frame you see.

barebones.scene: holds center mark - left index finger tap on 'every line' - two-hand outward sweep on 'every frame you see' - continuous delivery, no pauses
barebones.camera: locked static medium, waist-up, no camera move
barebones.style: documentary prestige, natural skin, neutral WB, no beauty filter

shots.video_prompt: Lip-synced, delivers: "Language models draft every line. Grok Imagine generates every frame you see."

shots.speech_text: No human filmed this. No editor cut it. Concept to final render — fully automated.

@2.description: see attached render. MATILDA: sassy, witty and charming with a soft, gentle voice; speaks German and English fluently with native Bavarian/Munich regional accent; English only in this scene

barebones.scene: holds center mark - decisive head shake on 'No human filmed' - flat palm cut gesture on 'No editor cut it' - continuous through 'fully automated', no pause
barebones.camera: locked static medium, waist-up, no camera move
barebones.style: documentary prestige, natural skin, neutral WB, no beauty filter

shots.video_prompt: Lip-synced, delivers: "No human filmed this. No editor cut it. Concept to final render — fully automated."

shots.speech_text: This is automated filmmaking. We are just getting started.

@2.description: see attached render. MATILDA: sassy, witty and charming with a soft, gentle voice; speaks German and English fluently with native Bavarian/Munich regional accent; English only in this scene

barebones.scene: holds center mark - chin lifts on 'automated filmmaking' - confident nod on 'getting started' - speech ends on gesture peak, no trailing stillness

intake._identity_lock_note: use_identity_lock=false because matilda_identity_lock.json uses references.meta_demo_presenter (not talent_avatar), which resolve_refs cannot find. avatar_reference provided directly. Permanent fix: add talent_avatar.url to matilda_identity_lock.json after uploading avatar to x.ai files API.
